Bus Timings

M3 Bus Timetable Abu Dhabi University Main Gate to Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI

January 16, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus route M3 in Abu Dhabi provides a vital connection between Abu Dhabi University Main Gate and Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI. The service ensures that students, professionals, and residents have a reliable and efficient means of transportation between these key locations.

Route Name M3
Route Description Abu Dhabi University Main Gate-Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI
Total Distance 16.5 km
Total Journey Time 30 minutes
Operational Hours 06:12 to 00:14 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 2
Official Website admobility. gov. ae (Abu Dhabi Mobility)

Download PDF Bus M3

Bus M3 Route in Abu Dhabi

Bus Timings

The M3 bus operates with frequent service throughout the day, ensuring passengers can travel at convenient times.

From Abu Dhabi University Main Gate From Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI
06:12 07:14
06:42 07:44
07:12 08:14
07:42 08:44
08:12 09:14
08:42 09:44
09:12 10:14
10:12 11:14
11:12 12:14
12:12 13:14
13:12 14:14
14:12 15:14
15:12 16:14
16:12 17:14
16:42 17:44
17:12 18:14
17:42 18:44
18:12 19:14
18:42 19:44
19:27 20:29
20:12 21:14
21:12 22:14
22:12 23:14
23:12 00:14

Bus M3 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link for M3 Bus Timings.

Also See: Complete Guide to Bus 83 Route and Stops in Dubai

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for the Abu Dhabi M3 bus is the same as for other standard bus routes in the city. As of February 2024, the standard fare is AED 2, plus an additional AED 0.05 for every kilometer traveled. To ensure accurate fare deduction and access to bus services, you must use a Hafilat Smart Card.

Bus Booking

Passengers can book their tickets for the M3 bus route using various convenient methods. Tickets can be purchased directly from bus stations or through online platforms. The Careem app provides a seamless booking experience, allowing passengers to plan their journey, check bus schedules, and purchase tickets in advance. This ensures a hassle-free travel experience, especially during peak hours.

Check out our guide on traveling from Abu Dhabi to Dammam by road, including bus schedules and fare reviews.

Bus Route

The M3 bus route starts from the Abu Dhabi University Main Gate and travels through several important stops before reaching its final destination at Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI. The major stops along this route include:

  1. Abu Dhabi University Main Gate

  2. Al Marhoum Eid Al Muraykhi Mosque

  3. Mazyad Mall

  4. Mazyad Mall

  5. Capital Mall

  6. Emirates Islamic Bank

  7. Street 13

  8. Street 12

  9. Ministry Of Education And Youth

  10. Street 12

  11. Street 12

  12. Street 14

  13. Civil Defence

  14. Al Jimi Worker Village

  15. Street 15

  16. Drivers and Vehicles Licensing Department

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Street 18

  2. Dalma Mall Main Entrance

  3. Dalma Mall West

  4. Lulu Logistics

  5. Al Saqlawi Street

  6. Al Basrah Street

  7. Emirates Identity Authority Factory

  8. Western Region Development Council

  9. First Abu Dhabi Bank

  10. Al Daraj Street

  11. Al Rasi Street

  12. Al Anwar Street

  13. Al Daye Street

  14. Al Nasr Street

  15. Al ‘iffah Street

  16. Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI

  17. Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the 216 bus route, which runs from Al Shahama Bus Station to Mohamed Bin Zayed City Bus Station, and the 410 route, which travels from Mussafah Port to LifeCare Hospital.

Read More: Abu Dhabi Bus 216: Essential Route and Stops Information

Tourist Destination Along the Way

  1. Mazyad Mall: This is a popular shopping destination that offers a variety of retail stores, dining options, and entertainment facilities. It’s a great place to spend a few hours shopping or grabbing a meal.

  2. Capital Mall: Another major shopping center along the route, Capital Mall offers numerous shopping outlets, restaurants, and entertainment options.

  3. Al Marhoum Eid Al Muraykhi Mosque: While primarily a place of worship, the architecture of this mosque may interest visitors who appreciate cultural and religious landmarks.

  4. Dalma Mall: One of Abu Dhabi’s largest malls, Dalma Mall features a wide range of retail stores, dining establishments, and entertainment facilities, including a cinema and family entertainment centers. It’s a must-visit for shopping enthusiasts.

5.

While the M3 bus route primarily serves residential and commercial purposes, the shopping malls and local landmarks along the route provide opportunities for dining, shopping, and cultural experiences.

Journey Experience

A trip on the M3 bus from Abu Dhabi University Main Gate to Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI offers a smooth and scenic journey through various educational and residential hubs in Abu Dhabi.

The bus provides a glimpse into the city’s modern urban development while maintaining easy access to important educational institutions.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI, the furthest point on the M3 bus route starting from Abu Dhabi University Main Gate. The journey offers a convenient connection with a price range of AED 37-44, making it a cost-effective option for reaching this key destination in Abu Dhabi.

With this comprehensive guide, navigating the M3 bus route between Abu Dhabi University Main Gate and Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI becomes straightforward, providing passengers with essential information for a hassle-free journey. Enjoy the convenience and reliability of Abu Dhabi’s public transport system, ensuring you reach your destination comfortably and on time.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)
